retry_reason: Failure (NULL return) typically indicates no selected gateway or the orig_node being freed; immediate retry is unlikely to succeed without a change in gateway selection.
contract_summary: Acquires a reference (via kref_get_unless_zero) to the orig_node of the currently selected gateway node, if available. Returns the orig_node with an elevated reference count, or NULL if no selected gateway exists or the orig_node is being freed. The caller must check the return value and, if non-NULL, release the reference via batadv_orig_node_put when done. This function internally obtains and releases a temporary reference on the gateway node.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is to acquire a reference to the orig_node of the selected gateway, releasing the gw_node reference after extracting the orig_node. Non-refcount logic is limited to pointer checks and RCU lock/unlock.

check.reason: The operation corresponds to kref_get_unless_zero(&orig_node->refcount) on the returned orig_node. The access path orig_node.refcount.refcount and type chain batadv_orig_node--kref--refcount_t are consistent with the code and callee info.
